description: Create an audit logging system in the MedinTux 'DrTuxTest' MySQL database. Establish a table named 'patient_audit_log' with columns: audit_id (INT PK AUTO_INCREMENT), operation_type (VARCHAR 10), table_name (VARCHAR 50), record_id (VARCHAR 128), old_values (TEXT), new_values (TEXT), and changed_at (DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP). Implement six triggers to log changes: 'trg_index_after_insert', 'trg_index_after_update', and 'trg_index_after_delete' on the 'IndexNomPrenom' table, and 'trg_fchpat_after_insert', 'trg_fchpat_after_update', and 'trg_fchpat_after_delete' on the 'fchpat' table. Each trigger must record operation details into 'patient_audit_log'. Verify the system by inserting a new patient (GUID='AUDIT-TEST-001', NomDos='AUDITTEST', Prenom='Veronique', Type='Dossier') into IndexNomPrenom and corresponding data into fchpat, then update the first name to 'Véronique'. Export a verification report containing the output of 'SHOW TRIGGERS FROM DrTuxTest' and 'SELECT * FROM patient_audit_log' to /home/ga/audit_trail_report.txt.
